category_sources: source_facts.description says this provides Python tools for interacting with Overture Maps data; official docs describe Overture's Python client for downloading geospatial data.
display_name_sources: Official Overture Maps documentation titles the tool as the Python Client; source_facts.name is overturemaps.
docs_sources: Official Overture Maps documentation has a dedicated Python Client page and top-level documentation site.
repo_sources: Official Overture Maps GitHub organization lists overturemaps-py as Overture's Python CLI; official Overture docs link to the overturemaps-py repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Python tools for Overture Maps data; official Python Client docs describe CLI/library downloads and GeoJSON/GeoParquet outputs.
